legacy.content:
--- status: complete phase: 01-planning-docs-baseline updated: 2026-02-23T06:18:19.572Z ---
## Tests
### 1. PROJECT, ROADMAP, and REQUIREMENTS are aligned with DungeonBreak and Narrative Engine; Phase 01 has a clear context (desired outcome, constraints, non-goals) and at least one plan with concrete tasks; TASK-REGISTRY or phase plans reflect the task breakdown. expected: PROJECT, ROADMAP, and REQUIREMENTS are aligned with DungeonBreak and Narrative Engine; Phase 01 has a clear context (desired outcome, constraints, non-goals) and at least one plan with concrete tasks; TASK-REGISTRY or phase plans reflect the task breakdown. result: skipped notes: Skipped in non-interactive mode.
### 2. Plan 01 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. expected: Plan 01 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. result: skipped notes: Skipped in non-interactive mode.
### 3. PROJECT, ROADMAP, and REQUIREMENTS are aligned with DungeonBreak and Narrative Engine; Phase 01 has a clear context (desired outcome, constraints, non-goals) and at least one plan with concrete tasks; TASK-REGISTRY or phase plans reflect the task breakdown. expected: PROJECT, ROADMAP, and REQUIREMENTS are aligned with DungeonBreak and Narrative Engine; Phase 01 has a clear context (desired outcome, constraints, non-goals) and at least one plan with concrete tasks; TASK-REGISTRY or phase plans reflect the task breakdown. result: skipped notes: Skipped in non-interactive mode.
### 4. Plan 02 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. expected: Plan 02 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. result: skipped notes: Skipped in non-interactive mode.
## Summary
- total: 4 - pass: 0 - issue: 0 - skipped: 4
